MeasurementToolMetadata.Description: The Penn Computerized Neurobehavioral Battery (CNB) is an online cognitive assessment consisting of a series of tasks that measure accuracy and speed of performance in major cognitive domains.

session_id.Description: BIDS session label assigned chronologically via Flywheel created timestamp

cnb_cpf_rtcr.LongName: CPF Median Response Time for Correct Responses

cnb_cpf_w_rtcr.LongName: CPF Weighted Median Response Time for Correct Responses

cnb_cpf_rter.LongName: CPF Median Response Time for Incorrect Responses

cnb_cpf_w_rter.LongName: CPF Weighted Median Response Time for Incorrect Responses

cnb_cpf_rt.LongName: CPF Median Response Time for All Responses

cnb_cpf_tprt.LongName: CPF Median Response Time for True Positive Responses

cnb_cpf_tnrt.LongName: CPF Median Response Time for True Negative Responses

cnb_cpf_fprt.LongName: CPF Median Response Time for False Positive Responses

cnb_cpf_fnrt.LongName: CPF Median Response Time for False Negative Responses

cnb_cpf_cnt_200.LongName: CPF Total Count of Responses Under 200 milliseconds

cnb_cpf_lrsr.LongName: CPF Longest Run of Same Responses

cnb_cpf_valid_code.LongName: Validation Code for entire Penn Face Memory Test

Levels.F: Likely valid, problem occurred which affected performance for a limited number of responses/mild to moderate effect
